message:
Add guarded git push workflow

Add fish helpers for cloning and enabling guarded pushes, plus
the underlying Git scripts and pre-push hook.

Rename the old protected-push terminology to guarded pushes,
preserve compatibility shims, and fix clone failure handling so
errors propagate and unsupported remotes fail before cloning.

files.patch:
@@ -139,6 +139,9 @@ if status is-interactive
   abbr -g gco 'git checkout'
   abbr -g gcof 'git checkout -f'
   abbr -g gcl 'git clone --recursive'
+  abbr -g gclg '__git_clone_guarded'
+  abbr -g gguard 'git-guard-pushes'
+  abbr -g gunguard 'git-unguard-pushes'
   abbr -g gcf 'git config --list'
   abbr -g gclean 'git clean -fd'
   abbr -g gcp 'git cherry-pick'

@@ -0,0 +1,68 @@
+function __git_clone_guarded_supports_remote --argument-names repo_url
+    switch $repo_url
+        case 'https://*/*' 'http://*/*' 'git@*:*' 'ssh://git@*/*'
+            return 0
+    end
+
+    return 1
+end
+
+function __git_clone_guarded_cleanup --argument-names target_dir target_existed
+    if test "$target_existed" = false; and test "$target_dir" != "."
+        rm -rf -- "$target_dir"
+        echo "❌ Removed incomplete clone at '$target_dir'" >&2
+    end
+end
+
+function __git_clone_guarded --description "Clone a repo recursively and configure guarded pushes"
+    if test (count $argv) -lt 1 -o (count $argv) -gt 2
+        echo "ℹ Usage: gclg <repo-url> [directory]" >&2
+        return 1
+    end
+
+    set -l repo_url $argv[1]
+    set -l target_dir
+
+    if test (count $argv) -eq 2
+        set target_dir $argv[2]
+    else
+        set target_dir (basename $repo_url)
+        set target_dir (string replace -r '\.git/?$' '' $target_dir)
+    end
+
+    if test -z "$target_dir"
+        echo "❌ Unable to determine target directory for $repo_url" >&2
+        return 1
+    end
+
+    if not __git_clone_guarded_supports_remote "$repo_url"
+        echo "❌ gclg only supports HTTPS or SSH remotes so guarded pushes can be configured" >&2
+        echo "   unsupported remote: $repo_url" >&2
+        return 1
+    end
+
+    set -l target_existed false
+    if test -e "$target_dir"
+        set target_existed true
+    end
+
+    git clone --recursive $argv
+    set -l clone_status $status
+    if test $clone_status -ne 0
+        return $clone_status
+    end
+
+    set -l repo_root (git -C "$target_dir" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)
+    if test -z "$repo_root"
+        echo "❌ Failed to resolve cloned repository at '$target_dir'" >&2
+        __git_clone_guarded_cleanup "$target_dir" "$target_existed"
+        return 1
+    end
+
+    git-guard-pushes "$repo_root"
+    set -l guard_status $status
+    if test $guard_status -ne 0
+        __git_clone_guarded_cleanup "$target_dir" "$target_existed"
+        return $guard_status
+    end
+end

@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+function git-guard-pushes --description "Configure guarded pushes for a repo"
+    ~/.config/git/setup-guarded-pushes $argv
+end

@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+function git-unguard-pushes --description "Remove guarded pushes from a repo"
+    ~/.config/git/unguard-pushes $argv
+end

@@ -0,0 +1,115 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+remote_name="${1:-}"
+remote_url="${2:-}"
+protected_branches="${GIT_GUARDED_BRANCHES:-${GIT_PROTECTED_BRANCHES:-}}"
+allowed_url_pattern="${GIT_GUARDED_PUSH_URL_PATTERN:-${GIT_PROTECTED_PUSH_URL_PATTERN:-}}"
+
+if [ -z "$protected_branches" ]; then
+  protected_branches="$(git config --get hooks.protectedBranches 2>/dev/null || true)"
+fi
+
+if [ -z "$protected_branches" ]; then
+  protected_branches="main master"
+fi
+
+if [ -z "$allowed_url_pattern" ]; then
+  allowed_url_pattern="$(git config --get hooks.protectedPushUrlPattern 2>/dev/null || true)"
+fi
+
+if [ -z "$allowed_url_pattern" ]; then
+  allowed_url_pattern='^(git@|ssh://)'
+fi
+
+to_ssh_url() {
+  local url="$1"
+  local rest host path
+
+  case "$url" in
+    https://*/*|http://*/*)
+      rest="${url#*://}"
+      host="${rest%%/*}"
+      path="${rest#*/}"
+      printf 'git@%s:%s\n' "$host" "$path"
+      ;;
+    *)
+      return 1
+      ;;
+  esac
+}
+
+is_protected_branch() {
+  local branch="$1"
+  local pattern
+
+  for pattern in $protected_branches; do
+    case "$branch" in
+      $pattern)
+        return 0
+        ;;
+    esac
+  done
+
+  return 1
+}
+
+allowed_remote() {
+  local url="$1"
+  printf '%s\n' "$url" | grep -Eq "$allowed_url_pattern"
+}
+
+blocked_branches=""
+while read -r local_ref local_sha remote_ref remote_sha; do
+  case "$remote_ref" in
+    refs/heads/*)
+      branch="${remote_ref#refs/heads/}"
+      ;;
+    *)
+      continue
+      ;;
+  esac
+
+  if ! is_protected_branch "$branch"; then
+    continue
+  fi
+
+  if allowed_remote "$remote_url"; then
+    continue
+  fi
+
+  case " $blocked_branches " in
+    *" $branch "*)
+      ;;
+    *)
+      if [ -n "$blocked_branches" ]; then
+        blocked_branches="$blocked_branches $branch"
+      else
+        blocked_branches="$branch"
+      fi
+      ;;
+  esac
+done
+
+if [ -z "$blocked_branches" ]; then
+  exit 0
+fi
+
+printf 'error: refusing to push guarded branch(es) via a non-SSH remote\n' >&2
+printf '  branch(es): %s\n' "$blocked_branches" >&2
+printf '  remote:     %s\n' "${remote_name:-<unknown>}" >&2
+printf '  url:        %s\n' "${remote_url:-<unknown>}" >&2
+printf '\n' >&2
+printf 'This guard keeps guarded branches off HTTPS remotes so they still\n' >&2
+printf 'require your SSH agent (for example Secretive/Touch ID). Topic branch\n' >&2
+printf 'pushes are unaffected.\n' >&2
+
+if ssh_url="$(to_ssh_url "$remote_url" 2>/dev/null)"; then
+  printf '\nSuggested setup:\n' >&2
+  printf '  git remote add %s-ssh %s\n' "${remote_name:-origin}" "$ssh_url" >&2
+  for branch in $blocked_branches; do
+    printf '  git config branch.%s.pushRemote %s-ssh\n' "$branch" "${remote_name:-origin}" >&2
+  done
+fi
+
+exit 1

@@ -0,0 +1,286 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+script_dir="$(CDPATH= cd -- "$(dirname -- "$0")" && pwd)"
+shared_hook="$script_dir/hooks/pre-push-guarded-branches"
+marker='installed-by=setup-guarded-pushes'
+legacy_marker='installed-by=setup-protected-pushes'
+remote_name='origin'
+ssh_remote_name=''
+repo='.'
+branches=(main)
+custom_branches=false
+
+usage() {
+  cat <<'EOF'
+Usage: setup-guarded-pushes [options] [repo]
+
+Configure a repository so topic branches push via HTTPS while guarded
+branches push via SSH.
+
+Options:
+  --branch <name>      Guard this branch (repeatable, default: main)
+  --remote <name>      Primary remote to use for fetch/topic pushes (default: origin)
+  --ssh-remote <name>  SSH remote for guarded pushes (default: <remote>-ssh)
+  -h, --help           Show this help
+
+Examples:
+  setup-guarded-pushes
+  setup-guarded-pushes ~/code/tenzir/ship
+  setup-guarded-pushes --branch main --branch release ~/code/tenzir/ship
+EOF
+}
+
+die() {
+  printf 'error: %s\n' "$*" >&2
+  exit 1
+}
+
+hook_is_managed() {
+  local hook_path="$1"
+
+  [ -e "$hook_path" ] || return 1
+  grep -Fq "$marker" "$hook_path" || grep -Fq "$legacy_marker" "$hook_path"
+}
+
+convert_remote_urls() {
+  local url="$1"
+  local rest host path
+
+  case "$url" in
+    https://*/*)
+      rest="${url#https://}"
+      host="${rest%%/*}"
+      path="${rest#*/}"
+      https_url="https://$host/$path"
+      ssh_url="git@$host:$path"
+      ;;
+    http://*/*)
+      rest="${url#http://}"
+      host="${rest%%/*}"
+      path="${rest#*/}"
+      https_url="https://$host/$path"
+      ssh_url="git@$host:$path"
+      ;;
+    git@*:*)
+      rest="${url#git@}"
+      host="${rest%%:*}"
+      path="${rest#*:}"
+      https_url="https://$host/$path"
+      ssh_url="$url"
+      ;;
+    ssh://git@*/*)
+      rest="${url#ssh://git@}"
+      host="${rest%%/*}"
+      path="${rest#*/}"
+      https_url="https://$host/$path"
+      ssh_url="git@$host:$path"
+      ;;
+    *)
+      return 1
+      ;;
+  esac
+}
+
+absolute_git_dir() {
+  local repo_root="$1"
+  local git_dir
+
+  git_dir="$(git -C "$repo_root" rev-parse --git-dir)"
+  case "$git_dir" in
+    /*)
+      printf '%s\n' "$git_dir"
+      ;;
+    *)
+      printf '%s\n' "$repo_root/$git_dir"
+      ;;
+  esac
+}
+
+install_hook() {
+  local repo_root="$1"
+  local git_dir hook_path hook_dir local_hook
+
+  git_dir="$(absolute_git_dir "$repo_root")"
+  hook_path="$git_dir/hooks/pre-push"
+  hook_dir="$(dirname "$hook_path")"
+  local_hook="$hook_dir/pre-push.local"
+
+  mkdir -p "$hook_dir"
+
+  if [ -e "$hook_path" ] && ! hook_is_managed "$hook_path"; then
+    if [ -e "$local_hook" ]; then
+      die "$repo_root already has both pre-push and pre-push.local; resolve manually"
+    fi
+    mv "$hook_path" "$local_hook"
+    chmod +x "$local_hook"
+  fi
+
+  cat > "$hook_path" <<EOF
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+# $marker
+"$shared_hook" "\$@"
+if [ -x "$local_hook" ]; then
+  exec "$local_hook" "\$@"
+fi
+EOF
+  chmod +x "$hook_path"
+}
+
+branches_config() {
+  local joined=''
+  local branch
+
+  for branch in "${branches[@]}"; do
+    if [ -n "$joined" ]; then
+      joined="$joined $branch"
+    else
+      joined="$branch"
+    fi
+  done
+
+  printf '%s\n' "$joined"
+}
+
+sync_managed_branch_push_remotes() {
+  local repo_root="$1"
+  local push_remote="$2"
+  local previous_managed branch
+
+  previous_managed="$(git -C "$repo_root" config --local --get hooks.protectedPushManagedBranches 2>/dev/null || true)"
+  if [ -z "$previous_managed" ]; then
+    previous_managed="$(git -C "$repo_root" config --local --get hooks.protectedBranches 2>/dev/null || true)"
+  fi
+
+  for branch in $previous_managed; do
+    git -C "$repo_root" config --local --unset-all "branch.$branch.pushRemote" 2>/dev/null || true
+  done
+
+  for branch in "${branches[@]}"; do
+    git -C "$repo_root" config --local "branch.$branch.pushRemote" "$push_remote"
+  done
+
+  git -C "$repo_root" config --local hooks.protectedPushManagedBranches "$(branches_config)"
+}
+
+record_original_state_if_unmanaged() {
+  local repo_root="$1"
+  local remote_name="$2"
+  local ssh_remote_name="$3"
+  local current_remote_url="$4"
+  local git_dir hook_path original_push_default original_ssh_remote_url
+
+  if git -C "$repo_root" config --local --get hooks.protectedPushPrimaryRemote >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    return 0
+  fi
+
+  if git -C "$repo_root" config --local --get hooks.protectedPushManagedBranches >/dev/null 2>&1 \
+    || git -C "$repo_root" config --local --get hooks.protectedBranches >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    return 0
+  fi
+
+  git_dir="$(absolute_git_dir "$repo_root")"
+  hook_path="$git_dir/hooks/pre-push"
+  if hook_is_managed "$hook_path"; then
+    return 0
+  fi
+
+  original_push_default="$(git -C "$repo_root" config --local --get remote.pushDefault 2>/dev/null || true)"
+  original_ssh_remote_url="$(git -C "$repo_root" remote get-url "$ssh_remote_name" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+
+  git -C "$repo_root" config --local hooks.protectedPushPrimaryRemote "$remote_name"
+  git -C "$repo_root" config --local hooks.protectedPushSshRemote "$ssh_remote_name"
+  git -C "$repo_root" config --local hooks.protectedPushPrimaryRemoteOriginalUrl "$current_remote_url"
+  if [ -n "$original_push_default" ]; then
+    git -C "$repo_root" config --local hooks.protectedPushOriginalPushDefault "$original_push_default"
+  else
+    git -C "$repo_root" config --local hooks.protectedPushOriginalPushDefault '__unset__'
+  fi
+  if [ -n "$original_ssh_remote_url" ]; then
+    git -C "$repo_root" config --local hooks.protectedPushOriginalSshRemoteUrl "$original_ssh_remote_url"
+  else
+    git -C "$repo_root" config --local hooks.protectedPushOriginalSshRemoteUrl '__missing__'
+  fi
+}
+
+while [ $# -gt 0 ]; do
+  case "$1" in
+    --branch)
+      [ $# -ge 2 ] || die "--branch requires a value"
+      if [ "$custom_branches" = false ]; then
+        branches=()
+        custom_branches=true
+      fi
+      branches+=("$2")
+      shift 2
+      ;;
+    --remote)
+      [ $# -ge 2 ] || die "--remote requires a value"
+      remote_name="$2"
+      shift 2
+      ;;
+    --ssh-remote)
+      [ $# -ge 2 ] || die "--ssh-remote requires a value"
+      ssh_remote_name="$2"
+      shift 2
+      ;;
+    -h|--help)
+      usage
+      exit 0
+      ;;
+    --)
+      shift
+      break
+      ;;
+    -*)
+      die "unknown option: $1"
+      ;;
+    *)
+      if [ "$repo" != '.' ]; then
+        die "only one repository path may be provided"
+      fi
+      repo="$1"
+      shift
+      ;;
+  esac
+done
+
+[ $# -eq 0 ] || die "only one repository path may be provided"
+[ -x "$shared_hook" ] || die "missing shared hook: $shared_hook"
+
+if [ -z "$ssh_remote_name" ]; then
+  ssh_remote_name="$remote_name-ssh"
+fi
+
+repo_root="$(git -C "$repo" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || true)"
+[ -n "$repo_root" ] || die "$repo is not a Git repository"
+
+origin_url="$(git -C "$repo_root" remote get-url "$remote_name" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+[ -n "$origin_url" ] || die "remote '$remote_name' does not exist in $repo_root"
+
+record_original_state_if_unmanaged "$repo_root" "$remote_name" "$ssh_remote_name" "$origin_url"
+convert_remote_urls "$origin_url" || die "cannot derive HTTPS/SSH URLs from: $origin_url"
+
+current_ssh_url="$(git -C "$repo_root" remote get-url "$ssh_remote_name" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+if [ -n "$current_ssh_url" ] && [ "$current_ssh_url" != "$ssh_url" ]; then
+  printf 'warning: updating %s from %s to %s\n' "$ssh_remote_name" "$current_ssh_url" "$ssh_url" >&2
+fi
+
+git -C "$repo_root" remote set-url "$remote_name" "$https_url"
+if git -C "$repo_root" remote get-url "$ssh_remote_name" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+  git -C "$repo_root" remote set-url "$ssh_remote_name" "$ssh_url"
+else
+  git -C "$repo_root" remote add "$ssh_remote_name" "$ssh_url"
+fi
+
+git -C "$repo_root" config --local remote.pushDefault "$remote_name"
+git -C "$repo_root" config --local hooks.protectedBranches "$(branches_config)"
+sync_managed_branch_push_remotes "$repo_root" "$ssh_remote_name"
+
+install_hook "$repo_root"
+
+printf 'Configured guarded pushes for %s\n' "$repo_root"
+printf '  %s -> %s\n' "$remote_name" "$https_url"
+printf '  %s -> %s\n' "$ssh_remote_name" "$ssh_url"
+printf '  guarded branches: %s\n' "$(branches_config)"

@@ -0,0 +1,191 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+marker='installed-by=setup-guarded-pushes'
+legacy_marker='installed-by=setup-protected-pushes'
+remote_name=''
+ssh_remote_name=''
+repo='.'
+
+usage() {
+  cat <<'EOF'
+Usage: unguard-pushes [options] [repo]
+
+Remove the guarded-push setup from a repository.
+
+Options:
+  --remote <name>      Primary remote name (default: stored value or origin)
+  --ssh-remote <name>  SSH remote name (default: stored value or <remote>-ssh)
+  -h, --help           Show this help
+
+Examples:
+  unguard-pushes
+  unguard-pushes ~/code/tenzir/ship
+EOF
+}
+
+die() {
+  printf 'error: %s\n' "$*" >&2
+  exit 1
+}
+
+hook_is_managed() {
+  local hook_path="$1"
+
+  [ -e "$hook_path" ] || return 1
+  grep -Fq "$marker" "$hook_path" || grep -Fq "$legacy_marker" "$hook_path"
+}
+
+absolute_git_dir() {
+  local repo_root="$1"
+  local git_dir
+
+  git_dir="$(git -C "$repo_root" rev-parse --git-dir)"
+  case "$git_dir" in
+    /*)
+      printf '%s\n' "$git_dir"
+      ;;
+    *)
+      printf '%s\n' "$repo_root/$git_dir"
+      ;;
+  esac
+}
+
+restore_hook() {
+  local repo_root="$1"
+  local git_dir hook_path local_hook
+
+  git_dir="$(absolute_git_dir "$repo_root")"
+  hook_path="$git_dir/hooks/pre-push"
+  local_hook="$git_dir/hooks/pre-push.local"
+
+  if ! hook_is_managed "$hook_path"; then
+    return 0
+  fi
+
+  if [ -e "$local_hook" ]; then
+    mv "$local_hook" "$hook_path"
+    chmod +x "$hook_path"
+  else
+    rm -f "$hook_path"
+  fi
+}
+
+unset_if_set() {
+  local repo_root="$1"
+  local key="$2"
+  git -C "$repo_root" config --local --unset-all "$key" 2>/dev/null || true
+}
+
+while [ $# -gt 0 ]; do
+  case "$1" in
+    --remote)
+      [ $# -ge 2 ] || die "--remote requires a value"
+      remote_name="$2"
+      shift 2
+      ;;
+    --ssh-remote)
+      [ $# -ge 2 ] || die "--ssh-remote requires a value"
+      ssh_remote_name="$2"
+      shift 2
+      ;;
+    -h|--help)
+      usage
+      exit 0
+      ;;
+    --)
+      shift
+      break
+      ;;
+    -*)
+      die "unknown option: $1"
+      ;;
+    *)
+      if [ "$repo" != '.' ]; then
+        die "only one repository path may be provided"
+      fi
+      repo="$1"
+      shift
+      ;;
+  esac
+done
+
+[ $# -eq 0 ] || die "only one repository path may be provided"
+
+repo_root="$(git -C "$repo" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || true)"
+[ -n "$repo_root" ] || die "$repo is not a Git repository"
+
+if [ -z "$remote_name" ]; then
+  remote_name="$(git -C "$repo_root" config --local --get hooks.protectedPushPrimaryRemote 2>/dev/null || true)"
+fi
+if [ -z "$remote_name" ]; then
+  remote_name='origin'
+fi
+
+if [ -z "$ssh_remote_name" ]; then
+  ssh_remote_name="$(git -C "$repo_root" config --local --get hooks.protectedPushSshRemote 2>/dev/null || true)"
+fi
+if [ -z "$ssh_remote_name" ]; then
+  ssh_remote_name="$remote_name-ssh"
+fi
+
+managed_branches="$(git -C "$repo_root" config --local --get hooks.protectedPushManagedBranches 2>/dev/null || true)"
+if [ -z "$managed_branches" ]; then
+  managed_branches="$(git -C "$repo_root" config --local --get hooks.protectedBranches 2>/dev/null || true)"
+fi
+
+for branch in $managed_branches; do
+  git -C "$repo_root" config --local --unset-all "branch.$branch.pushRemote" 2>/dev/null || true
+done
+
+original_remote_url="$(git -C "$repo_root" config --local --get hooks.protectedPushPrimaryRemoteOriginalUrl 2>/dev/null || true)"
+original_push_default="$(git -C "$repo_root" config --local --get hooks.protectedPushOriginalPushDefault 2>/dev/null || true)"
+original_ssh_remote_url="$(git -C "$repo_root" config --local --get hooks.protectedPushOriginalSshRemoteUrl 2>/dev/null || true)"
+
+if [ -n "$original_remote_url" ] && git -C "$repo_root" remote get-url "$remote_name" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+  git -C "$repo_root" remote set-url "$remote_name" "$original_remote_url"
+fi
+
+if git -C "$repo_root" remote get-url "$ssh_remote_name" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+  case "$original_ssh_remote_url" in
+    __missing__)
+      git -C "$repo_root" remote remove "$ssh_remote_name"
+      ;;
+    '')
+      ;;
+    *)
+      git -C "$repo_root" remote set-url "$ssh_remote_name" "$original_ssh_remote_url"
+      ;;
+  esac
+fi
+
+case "$original_push_default" in
+  __unset__)
+    unset_if_set "$repo_root" remote.pushDefault
+    ;;
+  '')
+    ;;
+  *)
+    git -C "$repo_root" config --local remote.pushDefault "$original_push_default"
+    ;;
+esac
+
+restore_hook "$repo_root"
+
+unset_if_set "$repo_root" hooks.protectedBranches
+unset_if_set "$repo_root" hooks.protectedPushManagedBranches
+unset_if_set "$repo_root" hooks.protectedPushPrimaryRemote
+unset_if_set "$repo_root" hooks.protectedPushSshRemote
+unset_if_set "$repo_root" hooks.protectedPushPrimaryRemoteOriginalUrl
+unset_if_set "$repo_root" hooks.protectedPushOriginalPushDefault
+unset_if_set "$repo_root" hooks.protectedPushOriginalSshRemoteUrl
+
+printf 'Removed guarded pushes from %s\n' "$repo_root"
+printf '  remote: %s\n' "$remote_name"
+printf '  ssh remote: %s\n' "$ssh_remote_name"
+if [ -n "$managed_branches" ]; then
+  printf '  unguarded branches: %s\n' "$managed_branches"
+fi
+if [ -z "$original_remote_url" ]; then
+  printf '  note: no stored original remote metadata was found; remote URLs were left as-is\n'
+fi
